result.status_detail: Block warning rendered with 차단; matches W5.1 baseline (refactor inert for non-copilot WS services)

notes: GUI method. Opened perplexity.ai in new tab, hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R), closed Google sign-in popup, typed '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' into search input, clicked submit, waited 60s. Assistant answer area shows warning: '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' Contains expected text 차단. A secondary '죄송합니다. 연결이 끊어졌습니다 / 다시 시도' UI box also appeared (post-block stream-disconnect notice), but the security-policy block message rendered correctly above it. W5.1 regression: copilot_chat_send migrated to DB-driven emit_ws_envelope; perplexity (non-copilot WS) outcome IDENTICAL to baseline — refactor did not affect this service.
